description: Subject-specific skillAttestation-family record. Replayable demonstration of competence on a specific CBK domain topic. STRUCTURAL ENFORCEMENT: credentialClaimedAttested const false — this is NOT a credential, it is a demonstration record (G7 + N13 negative-space enforcement). Used by L5 Vocation pathway gating (charters_compliance reviewer steward / toritate audit steward / Murakumo operator steward) per ADR-2605261000 — never the external credential possession. Per ADR-2605264400.

demonstrationType.description: G10 — all forms are self-paced demonstration, never time-limited high-stakes

demonstrationArtifactCid.description: IPFS CID of the demonstration record (audio / text / video transcript)

witnessingDids.description: optional peer witnesses; not required (self-paced demonstration is sufficient)

credentialClaimedAttested.description: STRUCTURAL — this record never asserts an external credential. G7 + N13 negative-space enforcement
